description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a dark green cover and white text prominently displayed on the front. The cover has a matte finish and features a simple line illustration of a building or institutional structure near the bottom. The book appears to be quite substantial, with a significant number of pages visible along the side and bottom edges. The edges of the pages are white, contrasting with the dark cover. The overall design is formal and utilitarian, suggesting it is a reference or academic volume. The book's cover is free of elaborate artwork, focusing instead on clear, bold typography and minimalistic graphics.
description: A thick, dark green hardcover book with white text and a simple line illustration on the front cover. The design is formal and utilitarian, with a matte finish and visible white page edges.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the white text and line illustration, with the book's thickness and white page edges apparent.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the side, highlighting the white page block and the dark green cover, with the front cover text partially visible.
description_view_2: The book is seen from the bottom edge, displaying the white pages and the reversed front cover text, with the cover's thickness evident.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the opposite side, showing the spine and the white page block, with the cover text visible in reverse.
attribute_title_text: AUDITORIA I Normas técnicas, planeación estratégica Objetivos y procedimientos
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark green with white text oriented horizontally, matching the front cover's style. No decorative elements or patterns are visible.
attribute_publisher_logo: A simple line illustration of a building is located near the bottom of the front cover, possibly serving as a publisher logo.
